title: ADM Home Page
note: Company-maintained overview of ADM's farmer partnerships, transportation capabilities, manufacturing footprint, and food, feed, fuel, and industrial-product scope.

title: ADM Investor Relations Overview
note: Investor-relations source describing ADM as a global agricultural supply-chain manager, processor, nutrition provider, and bio-based solutions innovator.

title: ADM 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing source for 2025 revenue, net earnings, segment revenue, commodity risk management, derivatives, and business economics.

title: ADM Services
note: ADM product and services page describing farmer services, investor services, transportation, logistics, market analysis, and risk-management support.

title: ADM Farmer Services and Farming Solutions
note: Product page for ADM farmer services, including grain marketing, fertilizer, crop insurance, regenerative agriculture support, digital tools, elevators, and processing facilities.

title: ADM Specialty and Edible Oils
note: ADM product page for edible and specialty oils, portfolio breadth, global supply, logistics, technical support, and oil applications.

title: ADM High-Quality Starch Solutions
note: ADM product page for native, functional native, modified, resistant, and moulding starches derived from feedstocks such as tapioca, wheat, and corn.

title: ADM Sugars and Sweetening Solutions
note: ADM product page describing its sugars, sweeteners, syrups, dextrose, fructose, maltodextrins, sugar-reduction systems, and formulation support.

title: ADM Ethanol
note: ADM product page describing industrial ethanol delivery, corn feedstock, fuel blending use, and co-production of animal feed.

title: Archer Daniels Midland Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for ADM market capitalization, share price, global rank, and historical market-cap context near the refresh date.

title: Archer Daniels Midland P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for ADM's trailing price-to-earnings ratio near the refresh date.

title: Open Food Network Repository
note: Open-source project source for a local food marketplace connecting farmers, food hubs, co-ops, independent food businesses, individuals, and local buyers.

title: farmOS
note: Open-source farm management, planning, and record-keeping platform relevant to farmer-owned agricultural data and decentralized crop records.

title: BioSTEAM Documentation
note: Technical documentation for an open-source platform for design, simulation, techno-economic analysis, and life-cycle assessment of chemical and biorefinery processes.

title: BioSTEAM Repository
note: Public source repository for BioSTEAM, used to assess openness and project availability.
